title: Continuity errors
wikitext:
[]: Continuity errors             Quote Post by Number 44 » Tue May 04, 2010 5:33 pm Continuity errors thread. List all the continuity in the series/movies.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue May 04, 2010 6:16 pm Hmmm... Not the best topic opener I've ever heard but I'll imagine that you asked a different question entirely. Are there any continuity errors in NGE you say? Well let me tell you that none come to mind other than in episode 14 during the compatibility test, it is shown on screen that Shinji is conversing with Asuka from Eva-01 when he is actually in Eva-00 IIRC.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 04, 2010 6:37 pm skikes wrote: Are there any continuity errors in NGE you say?

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue May 04, 2010 6:53 pm Sachi wrote: Oh, there's a bunch.

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Tue May 04, 2010 7:16 pm skikes wrote: Hmmm... Not the best topic opener I've ever heard but I'll imagine that you asked a different question entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Tue May 04, 2010 7:26 pm Misato's car never knows how damaged it is. Neither do the animators. That's the first one that springs to mind.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue May 04, 2010 8:04 pm Number 44 wrote: I don't pretend I'm gonna add anything new to the list, but for noobs like me, having it stickied might avoid lots of redundant and therefore annoying questions. Till the thread is found, how the in HFIL do tears in the Entry Plug make any sense? It's supposed to be filled with LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Tue May 04, 2010 9:40 pm skikes wrote: Nothing in fact to do with the LCL filled plugs makes much sense. The pilots come out dry, they move as though there were no liquid and they gurgle only for the first few seconds they are in an Eva and then never again.

[]:             Quote Post by Hoshikawa-kun » Tue May 04, 2010 9:56 pm Kaworu's synch tests in 24 designate him as the Second Children. I know this because I paused the episode trying to figure out how to read the synch scores.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 04, 2010 11:23 pm Hoshikawa-kun wrote: Kaworu's synch tests in 24 designate him as the Second Children.

[]:             Quote Post by Hoshikawa-kun » Wed May 05, 2010 6:09 am Sachi wrote: Couldn't this be explained by the fact that he was replacing the Second Child? It may have also said "Unit-02".

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 05, 2010 7:55 am Hoshikawa-kun wrote: It lists both the Unit and the Children. On the screen showing all the pilot's faces in the test plugs it says "FIFTH.C KAWORU NAGISA", while on the graph that has synch score mental contamination level it has "02 SECOND CHILDREN"

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed May 05, 2010 8:05 am http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=5877 ^This thread specifically addresses the animation errors made during the Sachiel and Shamshel fights in the series, it also has some pics from Rebuild 1.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Wed May 05, 2010 4:27 pm skikes wrote: If you knew it was redundant and annoying why ask it at all? If a topic was stickied every time a "noob" (I hate that term) asked a question that had already been answered every topic would be stickied. But it's not my place to lecture sooo...

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed May 05, 2010 4:58 pm Number 44 wrote: As for the term noob, it depends a lot on the community you're as to if the term is an insult, or just a description. Me, I'm new here, don't really know the tone of the place yet, nor am I as familiar with the topic as most of you. I have much to learn, I'm a noob. Anyhow, I was unable to find the previous continuity topic, so I'm dubbing this one the new one. It can always be merged later.

[]:             Quote Post by Number 44 » Wed May 05, 2010 5:53 pm This one may not actually be a continuity error, but angel blood color changes. Early episodes it's actually colored blue, later red. It seems an important distinction, since Eva-02's blood is blue and Eva-01's is red, which is an obvious clue that Eva-01 was a clone of Lilith, rather than Adam. Or it would have been if later angels didn't have red colored blood.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 05, 2010 6:10 pm I don't think the color of blood is at all a continuity error is more of a "LOL, IT LOOKS COOL. LETS ADD THIS IN WITH THE CROSS EXPLOSIONS."

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu May 06, 2010 1:22 am Number 44 wrote: This one may not actually be a continuity error, but angel blood color changes. Early episodes it's actually colored blue, later red.

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu May 06, 2010 2:42 am There aren't any continuity errors; only deep symbolism we haven't yet understood.

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Thu May 06, 2010 6:20 am So...How many of these continuity errors can be chalked up to animators making (sometimes incredibly stupid) mistakes?
